name: pi-behavior-control
description_en: Pi extension that enforces read-before-edit, post-edit review reminders, and speculation verification on every assistant turn. Runtime-agnostic — runs under upstream pi (@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent) and OMP (@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent).
description_zh: Pi 扩展，在每个助手回合上强制执行编辑前读取、编辑后审查提醒和推测验证。运行时不可知 — 在上游 pi (@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent) 和 OMP (@oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent) 下运行
